feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: i love you, i'm sorry
entry.summary:
Author: rainny_days

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,199Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: Buck sighs, tipping his head back slightly. "I got us lost, then I got us harassed by a bunch of idiots, and you had to deal with it all by yourself." "Because you were kidnapped." Because I love you, Buck barely manages to hold back. The real thing he had to apologize for, that he couldn't allow to escape from his lips. Sorry, I'm in love with you, so I can't help but want to spend more time with you. Sorry, I'm in love with you, and everyone can see it. Sorry, I'm in love with you, and I'd rather you never find me than get hurt on my behalf. I know it's selfish. I just love you. Sorry, sorry, sorry.9x13 coda: two apologies for being in love.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 129,070Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 86

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: Evangaline Buckley Begins
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,275Chapters: 21/24Kudos: 434

Summary: Evangaline Buckley has been alone for most of her life. She was unwanted by her parents and left by her sister when she had the first chance. For her most formative years, she had to go to extreme lengths just to get attention from those meant to care for her, failing more often than not.After finding out the truth about her creation, Evie decides that she has to do something – anything. She goes through even more pain and heartbreak before finding herself where she was always meant to end up. -+- This is both a prologue and season 1 rewrite.New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: The Replacement
entry.summary:
Author: DaniWib

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,804Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: Buck already knows what it’s like to live in the shadow of someone that can never be replaced. Then he wakes up in a stranger’s house with a woman who insists he’s her son. He’s spent his childhood being the wrong son. Will he have to spend the rest of his life doing it again?

entry.title: what should have been
entry.summary:
Author: softlightstills

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,498Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: Buck and Eddie are trying to get home to Los Angeles after the firefighter games in Nashville, in time for Hen's birthday but their flights are canceled. So they hit the road instead. And what started as a fun road trip, ended up with them getting lost, arguing, asking for directions at a diner in the middle of this small town and getting run off the road. Only for Eddie to wake up in the hospital and Buck in a strange house with a woman who keeps calling him "Derek". (while i liked the way this episode ended and how Eddie was the one to find Buck, and how they reunited... I thought of how it really should have ended. Still liked it and Oliver and Ryan's acting in this one, was superb!)

entry.title: The Place I Come Back To
entry.summary:
Author: Pastel Moon (PastelVA)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,912Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 13

Summary: After Buck is kidnapped by a man who blames him for an old loss, he makes it out alive, but not unchanged. Recovery comes in fragments: sleepless nights, trembling hands, grief that never quite learned how to leave, and the unbearable humiliation of needing to be held together by someone else. So he goes where he can still breathe. He goes to Eddie. Under Eddie’s roof, in the quiet shape of domesticity and the shadow of everything they have already lost, Buck begins to understand that survival is only the first half of the story. The second half is softer, but more frightening. And maybe, at last, a kind of coming home.

entry.title: [PODFIC] The Mortifying Ordeal Of Being Known by Polish_Amber
entry.summary:
Author: RockStar03

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 464Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 54

Summary: The thing was, the 118 was full of gossips. Eddie had been at the station less than a week before Hen and Chim wrangled details about his “hot young thing” from him (“Buck is only 4 years younger than me, he is not a ‘hot young thing’!” Eddie complained.) And Bobby was open about his worries for his son’s lack of direction and the secrets he appears to be keeping (“I just wish I could help Evan find the thing that gives him purpose,” Bobby lamented.) It just made it all the more ridiculous (and horrifying) when Eddie realizes he’s been dating his Captain’s son this whole time (“Defiling his baby,” Chimney cackled, because he clearly wanted Eddie murdered.)--Or, the AU where miscommunication abounds as Eddie seeks advice about his new relationship, Bobby despairs over his adopted son's career prospects and his refusal to talk about it, and Evan Buckley-Nash juggles training at the fire academy, building a family with his new boyfriend, and trying to work out how to tell his overprotective dad that he's already chosen the life he wants, actually. It takes a goddamn tsunami, of all things, to get the story straight.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: the 98th act
entry.summary:
Author: kingofprocrastination

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,608Chapters: 1/10Kudos: 7

Summary: Years later, Eddie would wonder exactly what the first sign was. If it was the cough or the fatigue. If it was the way that Buck always seemed to be just a little short of breath, or got dizzier than usual when standing up. He wondered if he had recognized the signs then, could he have changed things? Stopped the ticking of the clock, the slipping of the grains of sand into the bottom of the hourglass? Years later, he would realize that once the symptoms started to show, it was likely already too late. But that wasn’t what he had been paying attention to. No, Eddie had been focused on what had been simultaneously the easiest and (second) hardest thing he’d ever done: realizing he was in love with Evan Buckley.Or, how Eddie realizes that Buck is hiding a secret from the 118—one that could fundamentally change everything forever. This is a story about hope and grief, about coming to terms with oneself and learning to accept love. This is a story about love, loss, and all the messy things in between.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: after the storm
entry.summary:
Author: maydecember

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,874Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 177

Summary: “I think a therapist would disagree with that.” He clears his throat. “Uh, speaking of, I think—I think you should talk to someone. When we get to LA. A professional.” That, inexplicably, makes Buck laugh. “Like what? A trauma counselor?” “Yeah, Buck,” Eddie grits out. “Like a trauma counselor. Someone who specializes in PTSD.” “I don’t have PTSD. I’m immune to PTSD,” Buck deadpans. Eddie shoots him a look. “No one’s immune to PTSD,” he says quietly. “No one.”On the drive home, Buck and Eddie talk.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: I don't know what I do if something happened to you
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,810Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 76

Summary: Bobby’s last words leave Buck lost in grief and guilt, slowly pulling him inward.As he retreats, Eddie is left on the outside, grasping for a connection that keeps slipping through his fingers.Sometimes, distance hurts more than loss.And sometimes, it takes everything breaking apart to bring two people back together.

entry.title: i can't save us
entry.summary:
Author: purexheart

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,002Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 91

Summary: Her parents had forced her to keep her life before Hershey a secret from her new friends. She couldn’t talk about Daniel or the day he died. And she couldn’t talk about the week after when her parents ripped Evan out of her life as well. At fifteen, Maddie started to form a plan to get out of town and try everything she can to track her brother down. At eighteen, she took off while her parents slept in a bed upstairs with no idea where to begin, just knowing she had to try. Or; The Buckley’s couldn’t stand being reminded of Daniel every time they stare back into Evan’s eyes. They put him up for adoption, move towns, and try to start again no matter how much pain that put their daughter through.

entry.title: He’s Everything You Want, He’s Everything You Need
entry.summary:
Author: Orchid_217

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,039Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 49

Summary: Buck woke up with a horrible taste in his mouth. A taste of hair with a hint of puke and a feeling of regret for something he couldn’t remember. Rolling over on the hard carpet with his whole body aching he surveyed the hotel room when he sees familiar feet hanging out of a bathtub. “Eddie!” Buck winced at his own volume, a thumpping in his head followed. “Eddie” Buck whispered this time. Eddie shot up out of the tub with a groan glaring at Buck before laying back down. He immediately sat back up and stared at Buck. Buck looked around him double checking he was what Eddie was squinting at. “What?” Buck quietly asked, furrowing his eyebrows in worry. “You might want to take a look at yourself.” Or Buck wakes up covered in obvious signs of a hookup after Chimney’s bachelor party. But his boyfriend was not in attendance.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: there's no heaven without you
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,419Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 39

Summary: "Hey," Eddie says. "Can we go outside for a minute?" Buck looks up and his face is carefully neutral, which on Buck is the equivalent of a five-alarm blaze because this man has never been neutral about a single thing in his life. "Sure." They leave cash on the table and step out into the parking lot. The air is heavy and thick with honeysuckle and asphalt and the far-off electric promise of rain. The cat is gone and the neon sign buzzes above them, pink and sputtering. "I don't want to stay here tonight," Eddie says. Buck’s eyebrows tick up. "Okay?" Hesitating, cutting a look back at the diner, Eddie says, "Look, I know we were gonna find a motel somewhere around here but this place doesn't sit right with me. I can't explain it. I'd rather just keep driving." He's bracing for Buck to push back, to ask what specifically feels wrong, use this as a doorway back into the booth and the hand and all of it. But Buck just looks at his face for a second and nods. "Yeah. Okay. Let's go." Or,Buy one Buck kidnapping and get an Eddie kidnapping for free! Can be read as a standalone but is technically a continuation of my fic 'hands on'

entry.title: The Other Buckley
entry.summary:
Author: villayuly1987

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,598Chapters: 17/20Kudos: 151

Summary: When the Buckleys decide their daughter belongs in an institution, Evan Buckley makes a choice. He chooses his sister. Andrea Buckley has cerebral palsy. She uses a wheelchair, sometimes a walker. She laughs loud, talks fast, and refuses to be reduced to a diagnosis. She is Evan’s whole heart. The night their parents try to send her away, Evan packs her bags, takes the keys, and drives toward Los Angeles with no plan and no backup. He becomes her brother, her guardian, her steady ground. Years later at the 118, his instincts with adaptive care and kids finally make sense to everyone else. Slow burn. Found family. And maybe something more with Eddie Diaz.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: TENNESSE ORANGE (In Georgia they call it a Sin)
entry.summary:
Author: deadgraysclub

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,691Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: When Eddie Diaz met Evan Buckley, he didn’t know his life could change so much, for the better. Or a journey of love, acceptance, and joy.   based on the song "Tennessee Orange" by Megan Moroney.

entry.title: this has always been the ending
entry.summary:
Author: andthentheybow

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,232Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 249

Summary: “Well,” Buck says, as Eddie slams the hood of the car shut on the smoking engine, some twenty minutes after crossing the border into Arizona. “That’s unfortunate.” Or: one ambulance ride, hospital visit, partial drive, tow truck, shitty motel with one bed, and weird comment from a sheriff later, BuckandEddie finally find their last piece and make it home.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
